{"title":"Shane A Dsouza","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-03-04","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

it was an excellent trip to Vietnam very well coordinated by Bikram and team. Great Logistics even accommodating and making my trip memorable Great hotels Ground trips Vehicle pick up and drop politeness and punctual. answering calls promptly even in Vietnam wonderful sightseeing comfortable. Special thanks for making last arrangements for my daughter who joined us from Canada Tronto. Special arrangements on our 25th anniversary at no extra cost. Trip was economical too.

{"title":"SUTAPAR EATERY","rating":"5","publishDate":"2024-12-17","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

We recently had the pleasure of travelling to Singapore with the expert guidance of Travelxploria and it was an absolutely delight! from planning to execution, their team took care of every detail, ensuring a seamless and unforgettable experience for my family and me. Their meticulous attention to detail, from communication and personalised service made all the difference. The itinerary was thoughtfully curated covering all the must see attractions and experiences that Singapore has to offer. we were impressed by Tavelxploria's professionalism, reliability and commitment to customer satisfaction. Thanks to their exceptional service and Riya maa'm for making our first foreign trip truly memorable and we can't wait to plan our next adventure with them.

{"title":"Bhaskar Chakraborty","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-05","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

10th October 2024 we went on a trip to Meghalaya and Shillong which was arranged by Travel Exploria . All the beautiful places on our itinerary were well covered and time coordination was perfect .We were able to have a relaxing family trip and visit various tourist spots and get a taste of local cuisine and rich culture .The falls of Shillong ,lush green Meghalaya captivated us with its ethereal beauty . The highlights of our trip was forest safari at Kaziranga National Park were we saw one horned rhinoceros .Travel Exploria did an amazing job with the hotel bookings ,coordinations and tour planning. We have covered multiple international and national trips with travel Exploria since 2017 it’s always been a pleasant experience traveling with them.

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/Bhaskar Chakraborty/1750874629602-1.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Bhaskar Chakraborty/1750874629603-2.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Bhaskar Chakraborty/1750874629607-3.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Bhaskar Chakraborty/1750874629608-4.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Bhaskar Chakraborty/1750874629612-5.jpg"]}],"destination":["Guwahati","India","Shillong"]}

{"title":"Arun Sinha","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-01-03","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

Travelxploria organised our Vietnam trip in a most professional manner and thus made a memorable experience for us to be cherished for a long time.

I would certainly plan my next trip with Travel Exploria in the future.

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/Arun Sinha/1750874093525-1.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Arun Sinha/1750874093527-2.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Arun Sinha/1750874093529-3.jpg"]}],"destination":["Vietnam","Thailand","Indonesia","Singapore","Malaysia","Sri Lanka","Cambodia","Dubai","Georgia","Kazakhstan","Azerbaijan","France","India","England","Switzerland","Spain","Italy","Australia","Austria","Germany","Greece"]}

{"title":"Indranil Dey","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-01-22","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

This is the 2nd time my parents had a trip with Travelxploria, 1st time was Kashmir, this time was Kerela + Kanyakumari. They had an excellent experience. Both my parents are senior citizens, and they were taken utmost care at all the hotels wherever they had the night stay. They had a dedicated driver who provided end to end support from Kochi to Tiruvanthapuram. Almost all the tourist spots were covered which could be accessible by my parents. Me and my wife have full trust on Travelexporia without any anxiety.

I would always recommend Travelexporia for all my future trips of my parents and will also plan for myself as well.

Special thanks to Sudipto Metay who coordinated the tour.

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/Indranil Dey/1750873404411-1.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Indranil Dey/1750873404414-2.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Indranil Dey/1750873404415-3.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Indranil Dey/1750873404418-Untitled.jpg"]}],"destination":["India","Kerala"]}

{"title":"Swagata Chatterjee","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-11","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

Vietnam Tour from 11th Feb '25 to 20th Feb'25.

Vietnam tour was dream for us for long times. At last we could fulfill our dream with precise guidance of our tour operator Travelxploria.

We started our tour from Kolkata to Ho Chi Minh City (southern Vietnam) to Da Nang (Central Vietnam) and ended up at Hanoi (Northern Vietnam) to Kolkata, covering Cu Chi tunnels tour, Mackong Delta tour, Hop On Hop Off Ho Chi Minh City Bus tour, Marble Mountain tour, Hoi An Lantern Boat ride, Ba Na hill Golden Bridge, French Village tour, Da Nang Dragon Bridge Fire Show, Halong Bay Cruise night stay, Sampan Boat ride, Trung Trang Cave tour, Ninh Binh Ancient Capital tour, Tam Coc Boat ride, Hanoi Cycle Rickshaw city tour etc.

We have been accomodated in premium Hotels and Cruise and moreover liasoning of the tour itinerary in skill hands by our tour operator Travelxploria made the tour Hassle Free, Memorable, Fascinating and Mind Blowing.

Special thanks to CEO of Travelxploria, Ms.Riya Madam, tour cordinator Ms. Jenny from Vietnam and Mr. Bikram Mishra for their experienced organising skill made our tour remarkable.
We wish to travel with Travelxploria in ensuing days for exploring other destinations.

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/Swagata Chatterjee/1750101280690-1.png","uploads_media/reviews/Swagata Chatterjee/1750101280711-2.png","uploads_media/reviews/Swagata Chatterjee/1750101280718-3.png","uploads_media/reviews/Swagata Chatterjee/1750101280729-4.png","uploads_media/reviews/Swagata Chatterjee/1750101280741-5.png","uploads_media/reviews/Swagata Chatterjee/1750101280752-6.png","uploads_media/reviews/Swagata Chatterjee/1750101280760-8.png","uploads_media/reviews/Swagata Chatterjee/1750101280778-9.png"]}],"destination":["Vietnam","Thailand","Singapore","Malaysia","Sri Lanka","Dubai","Maldives","Mauritius","Georgia","Kazakhstan","Azerbaijan","France","Italy","Switzerland","Germany","Australia","Austria","England","Scotland","Spain","Prague","Kenya","Tanzania","Greece","Indonesia"]}

{"title":"Monojit Roy","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-03-05","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

\"I recently had the pleasure of traveling with Travel Exploria to Manali, Kasol, and Jibhi, and I must say it was an unforgettable experience!

A special shoutout to Mr. Sudipta, who arranged every detail of our trip to perfection. His expertise and knowledge of the region made all the difference in making our tour truly special.

From the breathtaking scenery to the warm hospitality, every aspect of our trip was meticulously planned and executed. The accommodations, transportation, and activities were all top-notch.

Travel Exploria's commitment to providing exceptional travel experiences is evident in every aspect of their service. I highly recommend them to anyone looking for a hassle-free and memorable trip.

Thank you, Mr. Sudipta and Travel Exploria, for creating lifelong memories for us!

Rating: 5/5 stars

Will I travel with them again? Absolutely!\"

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/Monojit Roy/1750100829564-1.png","uploads_media/reviews/Monojit Roy/1750100829587-2'.png","uploads_media/reviews/Monojit Roy/1750100829623-3.png","uploads_media/reviews/Monojit Roy/1750100829644-4.png","uploads_media/reviews/Monojit Roy/1750100829649-5.png","uploads_media/reviews/Monojit Roy/1750100829655-6.png"]}],"destination":["India","Manali","Kasol"]}

{"title":"Chayanika Ghosh","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-02-04","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

We went to Malaysia for celebrating our 1st Anniversary, Which went extremely well. The entire tour plan was so amazing starting from the hotels to all the events were so seamless. We are really happy for the entire gesture & definitely will travel with Travelxploria near future again.

{"title":"SUSANTA BHATTACHARJEE","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-03-12","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

We had Pondichery and Kerala tour from 8 to 19 March arranged by Travelxploria and the 'God's own country' was like roaming around heaven, but without splendid arrangements of stay and travel by the agency and mainly by Snehasish it was quite impossible.My best wishes for them and as they are in hospitality business be careful always and get updated everyday.

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/SUSANTA BHATTACHARJEE/1750100320127-1.png","uploads_media/reviews/SUSANTA BHATTACHARJEE/1750100320135-2.png","uploads_media/reviews/SUSANTA BHATTACHARJEE/1750100320153-3.png"]}],"destination":["India","Pondicherry"]}

{"title":"Sandip Bhattacharya","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-05-06","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

I think \"Travelxploria \" is the name on which any traveler can trust with 100% confidence. We went Ooty, Mysuru and Bengaluru at the end of November and all these tour program was organised by Travelxploria. It was an amazing and organised tour arranged by them. Ton of Thanks to Riya and Snehashis for arranging such a great tour. Wish them more success in their journey. I will always go with them in future.

We have travelled Puducherry, Kanyakumari and Kerala in the 2nd week of March, 2025. The entire tour was organised by Travelxploria. Nothing to say more about them. Excellent, Superb and outstanding arrangement. Thanks to Snehashish, Riya and entire Travelxploria team from my heart.

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/Sandip Bhattacharya/1750100098217-1.png","uploads_media/reviews/Sandip Bhattacharya/1750100098240-2.png","uploads_media/reviews/Sandip Bhattacharya/1750100098253-3.png","uploads_media/reviews/Sandip Bhattacharya/1750100098270-4.png"]}],"destination":["India","Thailand","Kerala","Indonesia","Singapore","Malaysia","Vietnam","Sri Lanka","Dubai"]}

{"title":"Sandip Mukherjee","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-04-09","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

We went to Singapore for a family trip and it was fabulous. Entire tour was very well planned by Mr. Sudipta and his team and well supported from beginning till end. We had a very nice outing and will choose Travelxporia again for sure.

{"title":"Sandip Das","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-05-14","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

Overall good experience credit to Travelxploria team again mainly goes to Mr. Sudipta who help & guide always since we started our plan. Little india is right place for indian food, Buggis street ideal for souvenir items. Singapore Immigration is the fastest i even seen.we are lucky to see Tulip festival in flower dome. thanks for everything.

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/Sandip Das/1750099324474-1.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Sandip Das/1750099324477-2.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Sandip Das/1750099324479-3.jpg"]}],"destination":["Singapore","Thailand","Indonesia","Dubai","Sri Lanka","Malaysia","France","Italy","Germany","England","Scotland","Spain","Austria","Australia","Kenya","Tanzania"]}

{"title":"Aritra Basu","rating":"5","publishDate":"2025-04-18","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

We went for a girls trip to Thailand on 18th April with TravelXploria first time.From day one I talked to Mr. Sanjib for our trip and he did the best customised trip for us as per our requirement & choices. The hotel ambassador in bangkok was superb. Through the entire trip , the Car he provided is soooo comfortable. In Phuket driver was excellent. In krabi , Island tour was amazing n refreshing! Got all the info through my WhatsApp regarding cab timing, airport pickup n all. Only two things I didn't like . Hotel Ao nang timber house in krabi . Service is poor , no security guard n no receptionist after 8.00 pm &no basic toiletries .Another thing is the driver in bangkok was soo rude n rigid specially non cooperative. Apart from these two things we enjoyed the entire trip. Thanks a lot to Mr. Sanjib for making our trip so smooth n happening. Thanks to TravelXploria entire team for their cooperation. Looking forward for more ...

","files":[]},{"type":"image","files":["uploads_media/reviews/Aritra Basu/1748074503039-1.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Aritra Basu/1748074503043-3.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Aritra Basu/1748074503045-4.jpg","uploads_media/reviews/Aritra Basu/1748074503053-Untitled.jpg"]}],"destination":["Thailand"]}

{"title":"Souvik Bhattacharya","rating":"5","publishDate":"2024-11-12","publishBy":"","subItems":[{"type":"text","content":"

I planned my honeymoon tour to Bali,Indonesia in Dec 2024 with TravelXploria and I must say I am very pleased with the type hotel and villa they had provided for us to stay and with our travelling guide during our tour. Especially the travelling guide was very polite and down to earth person he was on time everyday and explained us the cultures of Bali people's very well.

Overall I would give 5/5 to TravelXploria for all the services and I would definitely recommend TravelXploria to anyone to plan for a tour.

Thank you Riya madam and Sanjib da for planning our tour so wonderful.

I would definitely plan my upcoming tour with TravelXploria.
